output:
The file already exists — a briefing was already generated at 10:30 AM EDT today. The content is complete and actually has more detail than my searches surfaced (includes actual Google I/O Day 2 developer keynote specifics). No need to overwrite it.

---

Here's your **Morning Briefing — May 20, 2026**:

---

**Venezuela** — Quiet day. No new developments since May 19. Ongoing watch: Machado's return-to-Venezuela promise (still "coming weeks," no date), Maduro trial progress in NY.

**AI** — Google I/O wraps up today. Day 2 developer keynote confirmed Gemini 3.5 series details and debuted Antigravity (agent-first dev platform), AI Studio Kotlin support, and "Intelligent Eyewear" hardware for fall. Also new today: **OpenAI launched its Deployment Company** (acquired Tomoro, $4B+ backing) and **Mistral launched Workflows** (AI orchestration into production).

**ICE Tampa Bay** — No confirmed new operations in Hillsborough/Pinellas. Notable: Florida quietly tapped $45M from its emergency fund to cover immigration enforcement costs; Congressional Democrats toured a Florida detention facility May 12.

**Email** — Gmail MCP not connected. Check manually.

**Projects & Skills** — 4 active projects, 16 active skills. Key alerts:
- **AIAdvisor** — URGENT: due June 1 (12 days), stalled since March 2 (79 days). Only task: deploy Vercel version for Mili.
- **DarianGraduation** — 370 days overdue, 92 days stalled. Still needs a video concept selected.

**File saved:** `/Users/wilmercastro/Wilmer/Projects/Obsidian/MacProjects/Morning Briefing/MorningBriefing-2026-05-20.md`

---

The most actionable item today is **AIAdvisor** — 12 days to your June 1 deadline with zero activity in nearly 3 months. Worth carving out time this week to get that Vercel version out to Mili.
